name: LabelHub Dev
postCreateCommand: pnpm --version && mvn -pl services/api -DskipTests test-compile org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-surefire-plugin:3.2.5:test && mvn dependency:get -Dartifact=org.apache.maven.surefire:surefire-junit-platform:3.2.5 && mvn dependency:get -Dartifact=org.junit.platform:junit-platform-launcher:1.10.5
